final:
module RefModule(
    input A,
    input B,
    input clk,
    input reset,
    output reg X
);  wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge dbg_halt) begin
        if (reset) begin
            X <= 0;
        end else begin
            X <= A & B;
        end
    end

endmodule
